title.ko: 온도의 측정; 열량의 측정; 달리 속하지 않는 감온소자(방사선 고온측정법 G01J 5/00)
title.en: MEASURING TEMPERATURE; MEASURING QUANTITY OF HEAT; THERMALLY-SENSITIVE ELEMENTS NOT OTHERWISE PROVIDED FOR (radiation pyrometry G01J0005000000)

definition.ko: 온도 측정 동작원리에 특징이 있는 온도계 G01K5/00, G01K7/00, G01K9/00, G01K11/00 순시값 이외의 값을 지시하는 온도계 G01K3/00 세부 G01K1/00 특수한 목적에 대한 온도계의 적응 G01K13/00 온도계의 시험 및 교정 G01K15/00 열량측정; 열량계의 시험 및 교정 G01K17/00; 19/00

title.ko: 특수한 형태의 것이 아닌 온도계의 세부(열 관성 감소용 회로 G01K 7/42)
title.en: Details of thermometers not specially adapted for particular types of thermometer (circuits for reducing thermal inertia G01K0007420000)
Means for indicating or recording specially adapted for thermometers
for recording
for remote indication
Scales
Arrangements for facilitating reading, e.g. illumination, magnifying glass
Protective devices, e.g. casings
for preventing chemical attack
for preventing damage due to heat overloading
Supports; Fastening devices; Arrangements for mounting thermometers in particular locations
for measuring surface temperatures
Special arrangements for conducting heat from the object to the sensitive element
for reducing thermal inertia
Compensating for effects of temperature changes other than those to be measured, e.g. changes in ambient temperature
by means of fluid contained in a hollow body having parts which are deformable or displaceable under the pressure developed by the fluid
by means of compounded strips or plates, e.g. bimetallic strips
Compensating for effects of pressure changes

title.ko: 온도의 순간치 이외의 결과를 나타내는 온도계(G01K 7/42가 우선)
title.en: Thermometers giving results other than momentary value of temperature (G01K0007420000 takes precedence)
giving mean values; giving integrated values
in respect of time
in respect of space
giving differences of values; giving differentiated values
in respect of time, e.g. reacting only to a quick change of temperature
based upon expansion or contraction of materials
in respect of space

title.ko: 물질의 팽창 수축을 기초로한 온도측정(G01K 9/00이 우선; 온도의 순간치 이외의 결과를 나타내는 것 G01K 3/00)
title.en: Measuring temperature based on the expansion or contraction of a material (G01K0009000000 takes precedence;giving other than momentary value of temperature G01K0003000000)

title.ko: 물질이 액체인 것(G01K 5/32가 우선)
title.en: the material being a liquid (G01K0005320000 takes precedence)
Details
Arrangements for driving back the liquid column
Capillary tubes
Containers for the liquid
Selection of liquid compositions

title.ko: 액체가 다른 액주 또는 고체를 변위시키는 것(최대 또는 최소 지시용 G01K 5/20)
title.en: the liquid displacing a further liquid column or a solid body (for maximum or minimum indication G01K0005200000)
with electric contacts
with electric conversion means for final indication

title.ko: 최대 최소 또는 그 양쪽을 지시하는 수단을 가진 것(G01K 5/22가 우선)
title.en: with means for indicating a maximum or a minimum or both (G01K0005220000 takes precedence)
with provision for expansion indicating over not more than a few degrees
with provision for measuring the difference between two temperatures
with provision for adjusting zero point of scale, e.g. Beckmann thermometer

title.ko: 물질이 가스상태인 것(G01K 5/32가 우선)
title.en: the material being a gas (G01K0005320000 takes precedence)
the gas displacing a liquid column

title.ko: 물질에 의해 발생한 압력으로 변형 또는 변위될 수 있는 부재를 가진 중공체에 넣어지는 액체상태 물질(증기에 의해 발생한 압력에 의한 것 G01K 11/04)
title.en: the material being a fluid contained in a hollow body having parts which are deformable or displaceable under the pressure developed by the material (under pressure developed by evaporation G01K0011040000)

title.ko: 부재가 캡슐인 것(G01K 5/36, G01K 5/42가 우선)
title.en: the body being a capsule (G01K0005360000, G01K0005420000 take precedence)
the body being a tubular spring, e.g. Bourdon tube
of spiral formation
of helical formation
the body being a bellows
the body being a cylinder and piston
with electric conversion means for final indication

title.ko: 물질이 고체인 것
title.en: the material being a solid
arranged for free expansion or contraction
with electrical conversion means for final indication
consisting of pivotally-connected elements

title.ko: 팽창 또는 수축이 고체에 변형을 발생하도록 구속하는 것
title.en: constrained so that expansion or contraction causes a deformation of the solid

title.ko: 고체가 1점 이상으로 구속된 것, 예. 막대, 판, 다이어프램(G01K 5/62이 우선)
title.en: the solid body being constrained at more than one point, e.g. rod, plate, diaphragm (G01K0005620000 takes precedence)
the body being a flexible wire or ribbon
the solid body being formed of compounded strips or plates, e.g. bimetallic strip
Details of the compound system
Selection of composition of the components of the system
Shape of the system
specially adapted for indicating or recording
with electric transmission means for final indication

title.ko: 열에 직접 감응하는 전기적 또는 자기적 소자의 사용을 기초한 온도측정(온도의 순시치 이외의 결과를 나타내는 것 G01K 3/00)
title.en: Measuring temperature based on the use of electric or magnetic elements directly sensitive to heat (giving results other than momentary value of temperature G01K0003000000)

title.ko: PN 접합을 가지는 반도체를 이용하는 것(G01K 7/02, G01K 7/16, G01K 7/30이 우선)
title.en: using semiconducting elements having PN junctions (G01K0007020000, G01K0007160000, G01K0007300000 take precedence)
using thermoelectric elements, e.g. thermocouples
Arrangements for signalling failure or disconnection of thermocouples
the object to be measured not forming one of the thermoelectric materials
the thermoelectric materials being arranged one within the other with the junction at one end exposed to the object, e.g. sheathed type
the object to be measured forming one of the thermoelectric materials, e.g. pointed type
Arrangements for compensating for auxiliary variables, e.g. length of lead
Arrangements with respect to the cold junction, e.g. preventing influence of temperature of surrounding air
Circuits for cold-junction compensation
Arrangements for modifying the output characteristic, e.g. linearising

title.ko: 저항소자를 사용하는 것
title.en: using resistive elements

title.ko: 소자가 선형 저항체인 것, 예. 백금저항 온도계(G01K 7/26이 우선)
title.en: the element being a linear resistance, e.g. platinum resistance thermometer (G01K0007260000 takes precedence)
in a specially-adapted circuit, e.g. bridge circuit
for modifying the output characteristic, e.g. linearising

title.ko: 소자가 비선형 저항체, 예. 서미스터(thermister) (G01K 7/26이 우선)
title.en: the element being a non-linear resistance, e.g. thermistor (G01K0007260000 takes precedence)
in a specially-adapted circuit, e.g. bridge circuit
for modifying the output characteristic, e.g. linearising
the element being an electrolyte
in a specially-adapted circuit, e.g. bridge circuit
using thermal noise of resistances or conductors
using change of resonant frequency of a crystal
using capacitative elements
using magnetic elements, e.g. magnets, coils
the variations of temperature influencing the magnetic permeability
using ionisation of gases
Circuits effecting compensation of thermal inertia; Circuits for predicting the stationary value of a temperature

title.ko: 중량의 재배분에 의해 발생한 움직임을 기초로 한 온도측정, 예. 경사온도계(온도의 순시값을 주지 않는 것 G01K 3/00)
title.en: Measuring temperature based on movements caused by redistribution of weight, e.g. tilting thermometer (not giving momentary value of temperature G01K0003000000)

title.ko: 그룹 G01K 3/00, 5/00, 7/00, 또는 9/00에 포함되지 않는 물리적 또는 화학적 변화를 기초로 한 온도측정
title.en: Measuring temperature based on physical or chemical changes not covered by group G01K0003000000, G01K0005000000, G01K0007000000, or G01K0009000000
using evaporation or sublimation, e.g. by observing boiling
from material contained in a hollow body having parts which are deformable or displaceable under the pressure developed by the vapour
using melting, freezing, or softening
of disposable test bodies, e.g. cone
using sintering
using changes in colour, translucency or reflectance
using changes in reflectance
of inorganic materials
of organic materials
of organic liquid crystals
of materials which change translucency

title.ko: 열발광 물질을 사용하는 것(G01K 11/32가 우선)
title.en: using thermoluminescent materials (G01K0011320000 takes precedence)
using measurement of acoustic effects
of the velocity of propagation of sound
of resonant frequencies
using measurements of density
using measurement of the effect of a material on X-radiation, gamma radiation or particle radiation
using changes in transmittance, scattering or luminescence in optical fibres
at discrete locations in the fibre, e.g. using Bragg scattering
using changes in luminescence, e.g. at the distal end of the fibres
using Brillouin scattering
using Raman scattering

title.ko: 특수한 목적을 위해 적용된 온도계
title.en: Thermometers specially adapted for specific purposes
for measuring temperature of moving fluids or granular materials capable of flow
of moving gases
for measuring temperature of moving solid bodies
in linear movement
in rotary movement

title.ko: 퇴적물의 내부온도를 측정하는 것(대상물에서 감응소자에 열을 인도하기 위한 특별한 기구에 의한 것 G01K 1/16)
title.en: for measuring temperature within piled or stacked materials (by special arrangements for conducting heat from the object to the sensitive element G01K0001160000)
combined with sampling devices for measuring temperatures of samples of material
Clinical contact thermometers for use with humans or animals
Protective devices therefor, e.g. sleeves preventing contamination
Testing or calibrating of thermometers

title.ko: 열량의 측정
title.en: Measuring quantity of heat
Calorimeters using transport of an indicating substance, e.g. evaporation calorimeters
Calorimeters using compensation methods

title.ko: 유동매체에 의해 운반되는 열량의 측정, 예. 가열계에 있어서의 것(G01K 17/02, G01K 17/04가 우선)
title.en: Measuring quantity of heat conveyed by flowing media, e.g. in heating systems (G01K0017020000, G01K0017040000 take precedence)
based upon measurement of temperature difference
between an inlet and an outlet point, combined with measurement of rate of flow of the medium
Indicating product of flow and temperature difference directly
using mechanical means for both measurements
using electrical means for both measurements
using electrical means for one measurement and mechanical means for the other
across a radiating surface, combined with ascertainment of the heat-transmission coefficient
Testing or calibrating calorimeters
